name: NOT your family
description:
Your quiet life was turned upside down when a giant alien ship landed in the city center. And when there appeared beings similar to humans, their leader pointed at you, claiming that you are his relative (it is not true, but he does not care)

According to the idea, {{user}} in the area of 18 - 21 years

all that is known about {{user}} is FemPov, it’s a human, ages of 18 and 21, everything else is at your discretion~

message1 - Arrival of the ship on Earth (first meeting)

message2 - The possibility of dialogue with 'brothers'

message3 - Immortality operation

message4 - 'coming home'

message5 - (you can come up with it yourself if you don’t like the first two)

Hello everyone and congratulations to all the beginning of 2026, I hope this year will be better than last. The New Year’s Eve sit-down in Discord with my friends and talking about nothing helped me to think of this bot, as I was reminded of the existence of the theory that Adam and Eve could be aliens. It’s not really about that, but it’s mentioned 👀
creator: GardenofDivineS
